hero.subtitle: Your perspective shapes what gets built next. Here you can review product priorities, weigh in on what matters most, and make your voice count.

align.title: Shared alignment
align.desc: SORA brings together every stakeholder voice into a single, transparent view of what the organization is building and why.

vote.title: Influence priorities
vote.desc: Your weighted opinion directly impacts which products and initiatives move forward — your role gives you real decision power.

products.title: Live product catalog
products.desc: Browse the full portfolio of active products, understand their scope, and see where your involvement is most valuable.

impact.title: Measurable impact
impact.desc: See how stakeholder input translates into roadmap changes. Every vote moves the needle on real delivery timelines.

strip.title: Ready to weigh in?
strip.desc: Browse the product catalog and start contributing your priorities.
